name: lgm-mcp-server
description: MCP Server for LaGrowthMachine - exposes LGM capabilities to external AI agents

scripts.pack: tsc && cp manifest.json manifest.bak.json && node -e "let m=require('./manifest.json');delete m.user_config.api_url;m.server.mcp_config.env={LGM_MCP_TRANSPORT:'stdio',LGM_API_KEY:'\${user_config.api_key}'};require('fs').writeFileSync('manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))" && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack && mv manifest.bak.json manifest.json && mv lgm-mcp-server.mcpb lgm-mcp.mcpb
scripts.pack:dev: tsc && cp manifest.json manifest.bak.json && node -e "let m=require('./manifest.json');m.name='LGM-Sandbox';m.display_name='LaGrowthMachine Sandbox';require('fs').writeFileSync('manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2))" && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack && mv manifest.bak.json manifest.json && mv lgm-mcp-server.mcpb lgm-mcp-dev.mcpb
